1.title: 1. How Great Thou Art
1.content:
1. Pumi Patheen idawr sindawng roi moni !
   Nangkhut kon kholok kemeje pha khan
   Arshi kumuk, relek kho miri kejet
   Nang ranaak le nangjeng nang lurna nih.

   Karatha na nangkha lah le na-awi } 2
   Chungchon na leen Pumi nang nih

2. Mangpui, thingpui, rubuk hi sindawng awm naw !
   Zu le va hai lah hoi thaw kha kejet
   Lawn rasang ah put khan kojong en pha khan
   Hawr ah tuilong ruhu khana nesem.

3. Patheen na, Sapa kha manar boi pet ah
   Kuruhut ah thirang nang jong tir joi
   Kopok rik Cross chung ah ningai ah ruphung
   Nithit pe ah kumunu chawi sojoi.

4. Khongle lawi le Khrista na jongchum pha khan
   Ningai ah Inn teeng keei nawchawi rang nih
   Keeina chiboi ah 'Madeeng chubai thaw rang
   Chungchon na leen Pumi nangni tirang.

2.title: 2. Lyrics
2.content: Lyrics for this song will be added here.

3.title: 3. Lyrics
3.content: Lyrics for this song will be added here.

4.title: 4. Crown Him King
4.content:
1. Khrista kha Reng lukhum mukhu ro
   Kum rikip mapak na niroso
   Ama riming chungchon na lawm rawi
   Tun khan chat boi pet ah.

   Keeini reng lukhum mukhu rawi
   Ningai na ram khan Reng lukhum kha
   Keeini na mu khu rang mapak jawn jai rang rawi.

2. Lawmro Ravantir na awm mapak
   'Ma reng sut munkhan lah le dep ro
   Phung rikip na ningai ah mapak
   Rengchung chon na Reng kha.

3. Munu rakha 'Mana mawtawr joi
   'Ma ratha mulung ah awm roso
   'Ma riming ah ra kha mawtawr rang
   Reng lukhum mukhu rang.
